name: shape
description: Marketplace for the `shape` plugin — frames any task into one of 11 agent-execution shapes (Pipeline, Swarm, Critic, Gated, Contract, Loop, One-shot, Event, Dialogue, Search, Blackboard) for the orchestrator to execute.

plugins.name: shape
plugins.description: Agent-execution shape framers. Each skill takes a task and produces an explicit shape contract — stages, workers, termination, failure handling — for the orchestrator to execute.
